title: Huawei 1.25G SFP optical transceiver, SM, 1310nm, 40km, 2x LC konektor, DDM
category: Optical networks / SFP optical modules / SFP
description: The Huawei S-SFP-GE-LH40-SM1310 is a single-mode 1.25G SFP module with a wavelength of 1310nm and two LC connectors for connections up to a distance of 40km The LC connectors in the SFP module have UPC polishing
